message:
fix(core): add small-budget guard to cass redact_and_truncate

When max_len < 3 (the ellipsis length), the function would still append
"..." after truncation, producing output exceeding the byte budget.
For example, max_len=1 would produce "..." (3 bytes). Add an explicit
guard matching the pattern already used in caut.rs: truncate to
max_len bytes without the ellipsis when there is no room for it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
